# archerdb-dotnet

The ArcherDB .NET client for high-performance geospatial data storage and queries.

## Prerequisites

Linux >= 5.6 is the only production environment we support. For development, macOS and Windows are also supported.

* .NET >= 8.0

And if you do not already have NuGet.org as a package source, make sure to add it:

```console
dotnet nuget add source https://api.nuget.org/v3/index.json -n nuget.org
```

## Setup

```console
dotnet new console
dotnet add package archerdb
```

## Quick Start

```cs
using System;
using ArcherDB;

var address = Environment.GetEnvironmentVariable("ARCHERDB_ADDRESS") ?? "127.0.0.1:3001";

using var client = new GeoClient(0, new[] { address });

var entityId = ID.Create();
var geoEvent = new GeoEvent
{
    Id = 0,
    EntityId = entityId,
    CorrelationId = 0,
    UserData = 0,
    LatNano = GeoFormatParser.DegreesToNano(37.7749),
    LonNano = GeoFormatParser.DegreesToNano(-122.4194),
    GroupId = 1,
    Timestamp = 0,
    AltitudeMm = 0,
    VelocityMms = 0,
    TtlSeconds = 0,
    AccuracyMm = 0,
    HeadingCdeg = 0,
    Flags = GeoEventFlags.None,
};

var insertResult = client.InsertEvent(geoEvent);
Console.WriteLine($"Insert result: {insertResult}");

var radiusResults = client.QueryByRadius(new QueryRadiusFilter
{
    CenterLatNano = GeoFormatParser.DegreesToNano(37.7749),
    CenterLonNano = GeoFormatParser.DegreesToNano(-122.4194),
    RadiusMm = 1_000_000,
    Limit = 100,
    TimestampMin = 0,
    TimestampMax = 0,
    GroupId = 0,
});

Console.WriteLine($"Found {radiusResults.Length} events within 1km");
```

## Creating a Client

```cs
using ArcherDB;

var client = new GeoClient(0, new[]
{
    "127.0.0.1:3001",
    "127.0.0.1:3002",
    "127.0.0.1:3003",
});

// When done
client.Dispose();
```

## GeoEvent Structure

`GeoEvent` uses nanodegrees for coordinates:

```cs
var geoEvent = new GeoEvent
{
    Id = 0,
    EntityId = ID.Create(),
    CorrelationId = 0,
    UserData = 0,
    LatNano = GeoFormatParser.DegreesToNano(37.7749),
    LonNano = GeoFormatParser.DegreesToNano(-122.4194),
    GroupId = 1,
    Timestamp = 0,
    AltitudeMm = 0,
    VelocityMms = 0,
    TtlSeconds = 0,
    AccuracyMm = 0,
    HeadingCdeg = 0,
    Flags = GeoEventFlags.None,
};
```

## Insert Events

```cs
var results = client.InsertEvents(new[] { geoEvent });
foreach (var result in results)
{
    if (result.Result != InsertGeoEventResult.Ok)
    {
        Console.WriteLine($"Event {result.Index} failed: {result.Result}");
    }
}
```

## Query by UUID

```cs
var found = client.QueryByUuid(new QueryUuidFilter { EntityId = entityId });
```

## Query by UUID Batch

```cs
var batch = client.QueryByUuidBatch(new[] { entityId1, entityId2 });
Console.WriteLine($"Found: {batch.FoundCount}, Missing: {batch.NotFoundCount}");
```

## Query by Radius

```cs
var results = client.QueryByRadius(new QueryRadiusFilter
{
    CenterLatNano = GeoFormatParser.DegreesToNano(37.7749),
    CenterLonNano = GeoFormatParser.DegreesToNano(-122.4194),
    RadiusMm = 5_000_000,
    Limit = 1000,
    TimestampMin = 0,
    TimestampMax = 0,
    GroupId = 0,
});
```

## Query Latest

```cs
var results = client.QueryLatest(new QueryLatestFilter
{
    Limit = 100,
    GroupId = 0,
    CursorTimestamp = 0,
});
```

## Delete Entities

```cs
var result = client.DeleteEntity(entityId);
Console.WriteLine(result);
```

## TTL Operations

```cs
var set = client.SetTtl(entityId, 3600);
var extend = client.ExtendTtl(entityId, 3600);
var clear = client.ClearTtl(entityId);
```
